title: geranium ocellatum var. sublaeve
intro: Geranium ocellatum var. sublaeve, also known as the lesser geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Geranium ocellatum var. sublaeve include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to promote wound healing and calm the nervous system.
